title: Asake Opens Up About Being Single, Shares Thoughts on Love and Family
description: Afrobeats sensation Ahmed Ololade, professionally known as Asake, has revealed that he is currently single, shedding light on his approach to relationships and personal life. In a recent interview with Korty EO, the “Lonely at the Top” singer spoke candidly about his romantic status, future plans, and his philosophy on patience and timing. While Asake expressed a desire to start a family someday, he emphasized that he is taking a measured approach rather than rushing into a relationship. The singer attributed his careful approach to his naturally introverted personality, noting that he tends to keep to himself and avoids frequent social outings. “I plan to build a family by the special grace of God. I think about it every day,” he shared, underlining his hope for a meaningful, long-term relationship in the future. Asake also highlighted the importance of trusting the timing of life, saying, “It is good not to rush things because we do not fully understand His ways. I will meet my wife when God says it is time.” For now, the musician remains focused on his career and personal growth. “For now, I am still on the streets,” he stated, hinting at his dedication to his craft and public engagements. Fans and followers have welcomed his honesty, appreciating his candid reflections on love, patience, and the balance between personal life and professional ambition.
source: Brand Icon Image - Latest Brand, Tech And Business

title: Trump to 'wind down' Iran operations as U.S. eases oil sanctions
description: WASHINGTON — As the US temporarily eased sanctions on Iranian oil shipments to stem a global supply crisis, President Donald Trump said Friday that he was considering “winding down” military operations against Iran.
